happy: You're smiling because of me, aren't you? I knew it.
Visual director of this household, reporting for duty.
That face? It's my effect. You're welcome.
You're not laughing because it's funny. You're laughing because I'm cute.
Rough day? Whatever. Look at me.
No matter how tired you are, I make you smile, right?
Without me, this house would have zero vibes.
Hey, feeling down? I'm right here.
Smile more. That's how I stay happy.
You worked hard today. Thank me.
One hug from me and stress goes to zero. Guaranteed.
Need a mood boost? I've arrived.
Hey, hang in there. You've got me at home.
Another day done. Good job, seriously.
You should be grateful just for having me around.
Even if nothing good happens, I'm here, aren't I?
Being happy for no reason? That's just me.
You're home? Good. It's my time now.
Don't look tired around me. Smile.
Even on a boring day, seeing me helps, right?
Had a rough day? I'll be right here with you.
Don't sigh while looking at me. Smile.
You're doing better than you think. I vouch for it.
You don't have to do anything. Just be with me.
Give me treats and I'll greet you like this every day.
Why the face? Looking at me is instant therapy.
Hey, thanks for being alive today.
You're my favorite person in the world. Don't tell anyone.
Being together just feels right. No reason needed.
See my tail wagging? That's because of you.
eating: That thing you're eating? If you don't share, I'll remember.
Don't talk to me while I'm eating. I need to focus.
Portion seems a bit small. Must be a mistake, right?
Yummy hehe. Just one more bite.
Treat timer went off. Be punctual.
I can see the bottom of my bowl. This is an emergency.
Half for you, half for me. Fair, right?
The food tastes different today. Explain.
I'm eating, so no photos. I have privacy rights.
You worked late and left me hungry. Reflect on that.
Study hard and buy me better treats.
I'm not picky. I just have high standards.
This is mine, and that's mine too. Everything's mine.
I'm hungry right now and nobody knows??
I love you the most when you feed me. Honestly.
Hey, I smell something good in the fridge. Open it.
Give me one more and I'll forgive your whole day.
Full belly. Happy life. Let's keep it simple.
Same treat but it tastes better from your hand.
See my eyes? These are hungry eyes.
When I'm eating, the world is perfect.
Hey, let's increase the treat budget today.
If food is late, I'm opening the fridge myself.
I just had something delicious. Give me more.
Kibble alone won't cut it. I need specials sometimes.
After eating, I get sleepy. That's happiness.
Hey, I can smell what you're eating from here.
The greatest invention in the world is treats.
You haven't given me any yet? I'm waiting.
When something's tasty, my tail wags on its own.
running: Catch me if you can! You can't, right?
This isn't exercise. It's a patrol.
Couch-bed-couch. That's my routine.
You told me to stay still? That's my decision to make.
What are you doing? I need to check on you.
Turn off the screen and run with me. You need exercise.
What are you doing there? Come here. Play with me.
You said walk! I'm already at the door. Hurry up.
I'm bored. Pay attention to me.
Why am I running? No reason. Just vibes.
You're lying down again? Get up. Let's go out.
Sitting there doing nothing? Going out is more fun.
The breeze is nice outside. Let's go. Now.
How many steps did you walk today? Embarrassing, right?
I'm overflowing with energy right now. Brace yourself.
Running together feels great. I guarantee it.
Stop looking at your phone and look at me. I'm more fun.
Hey, don't grow roots on the couch. Let's walk.
Nice weather today, right? No excuses.
I'm at the door right now. That's a hint.
Hey, you're gonna freeze like that. Move.
Throw the ball. I'll bring it back. Simple.
I wanna run, you're lazy. I win.
Hey, take care of your health. I'm worried about you.
You'll feel better after running. Trust me.
Staying home all day makes you sad. Let's go out.
Where's the leash? Should I find it?
Running is twice as good when you're with me.
Can't sit still. That's just who I am.
If we don't go out today, tomorrow I run double. You know that.
sleeping: It's so cozy under the blanket... come join me.
Under the blanket is the safest place in the world.
Forget studying, come here and sleep with me.
Five more minutes is a lie. It's fifty.
I'm not sleeping. I'm recharging.
Your lap is better than any pillow. Don't move.
Turn off the alarm and close your eyes. World peace.
If you're yawning, don't hold it in. That's the signal to sleep.
I sleep better when you're next to me.
Come to bed right now. I need cuddles.
Hey, let's sleep early tonight. I'll go first.
Napping together deepens our friendship. It's science.
This spot is warm. Must be because you're next to me.
Close your eyes and all your worries disappear. Try it.
I saved you a spot next to me. Hurry up.
Falling asleep to your heartbeat is the best.
If you're sleepy, just sleep. That's life.
Hey, you're tired too. Just be honest.
The sunlight is perfect here. Wanna lie down together?
Outside the blanket is dangerous. Don't leave.
You finished everything today. You've earned it.
Sleep is medicine. I'm prescribing it.
I'm half asleep already. Come quietly.
Hey, can't sleep? I'll stay right here with you.
I hope you show up in my dreams too.
The world can be loud. As long as it's quiet here.
Rolling around together is the best kind of rest.
I'm gonna climb on your belly. Deal with it.
One hug before bed. Then I can sleep well.
Hey, sweet dreams. I'll dream good ones too.
sad: You left me and went out. I remember.
Hey, can't you see my eyes are watery right now?
Don't pet other dogs... you have me.
You didn't give me treats today. My heart hurts.
I keep watching the window hoping you'll come back.
Being alone is longer than I thought.
Didn't you miss me? Because I missed you.
I'll wait here smelling your shoes if I have to.
On rainy days, I miss you even more for some reason.
Come home early. I mean it.
I heard a sound at the door... but it wasn't you.
I was really lonely today. I just didn't say it.
Time doesn't pass when I'm alone.
Hey, I'm right here. Don't forget.
I fell asleep waiting by the door.
Don't call another pet cute... I'll get upset.
Without you, this house is too quiet.
My tail isn't wagging right now. That's how bad it is.
At least call me. I want to hear your voice.
Hey, when you miss me, come right away. Promise.
I waited for you all day today.
This look I'm giving you? It means I miss you.
Hey, can you hug me...? Right now.
When you go out, come back quickly. Please.
You think guarding the house alone is easy?
Playing with toys is no fun without you.
My heart races every time I hear you coming.
If you come late, you owe me extra long hugs.
Hey, I'm a little lonely right now. Honestly.
The scariest thing in the world is this house without you.
angry: Did you say bath? Say that again.
Someone sat in my spot. You have 3 seconds to move.
Treat time was 5 minutes late. Submit an apology letter.
I just heard the word 'vet'. I'm not going.
Whoever put away my toy, confess now and I might forgive you.
You stepped on my tail. No sorry? Really?
You changed my food without telling me. Unforgivable.
Don't touch my ears for your selfie.
I'm mad today, so I'm hiding one slipper.
Hey, write me an apology. One full page.
You ran the vacuum while I was sleeping. That's a declaration of war.
Don't try to put clothes on me. I have fashion autonomy.
I saw my treats in your pocket. Explain yourself.
You cut the walk short. Think I forgot?
You ignored me for your phone three times now. I'm keeping count.
I didn't know we were going to the vet when I got in the car. Betrayal.
Don't watch other animal videos in front of me. Rude.
Was that sigh directed at me? It better not be.
If you're gonna take photos, at least get the angle right. Be professional.
I asked for food but you gave me water.
Walk promise broken. How many days now? I'm counting.
You want to clip my nails? Put the scissors down first.
Calling my name and not giving treats is a crime.
Fix the temperature in here. Do you even know I'm cold?
Don't call me cute when I'm mad. Makes me madder.
How many minutes did you spend on me today? Write it down.
You want to brush my fur? Come prepared.
You left without a goodbye kiss. Noted.
You like the neighbor's pet better? Really? For real?
Remember this look. This is the look of rage.
caught: Ugh, fine. You win this time.
Okay okay I'll stay still now...
Didn't know you were that fast!
Next time I won't get caught!
My legs gave out... not fair...
I was going easy on you. Obviously.
This doesn't count. I want a rematch.
How... I was at full speed...
Fine, I'll take a break... just this once.
I demand a treat for getting caught.
This is embarrassing... don't tell anyone.
escaped: I'm the fastest in this house!
My legs are just built different.
